# glama-status-mcp

Daily-refreshed Glama score tracker for the MCP fleet. Scrapes per-tool TDQS grades from glama.ai, stores in SQLite with snapshot history, surfaces via MCP tools and a Vite/React web dashboard.

## Tools

- `glama_status` -- Portmanteau: list (all repos), get (one repo, per-tool breakdown), worst_tools (lowest scoring tools), refresh (rescrape all + snapshot), history (refresh log), staleness (>7d stale), report (full daily report), deltas (score changes since last snapshot).
- `glama_scores_summary` -- Compact fleet-wide score summary with grade distribution.
- `glama_daily_report` -- Full markdown daily report: grade table, score deltas, worst tools, stale repos.
- `show_glama_status_card` -- Prefab card: fleet overview with grade distribution bars and worst tools.
- `show_glama_repo_card(repo_name)` -- Prefab card: per-repo breakdown with tool scores.

## Prompts

- `glama_improvement_plan(repo_name)` -- Docstring improvement plan with per-tool priorities.

## Ports

- Backend (FastAPI + MCP HTTP /mcp): 11072
- Frontend (Vite dev): 11073

## Quick Start

```powershell
git clone https://github.com/sandraschi/glama-status-mcp.git
cd glama-status-mcp
just install
just web          # HTTP backend on :11072
just web-frontend # Vite dev on :11073
just refresh      # Manual scrape + snapshot
```

## Scored Repos (10 of 35 registered on Glama)

virtualization-mcp (B, 3.06), bumi-mcp (A, 3.64), blender-mcp (C, 2.70), windows-operations-mcp (B, 3.00), worldlabs-mcp (B, 3.38), robotics-mcp (A, 3.58), xkcd-mcp (A, 3.67), cursor-mcp (A, 3.80), steam-mcp (A, 3.81), email-mcp (A, 3.82).
